tuning: E A D G B E
content:
ORDER: I V1 [ch]C[/ch] INT1 V2 [ch]C[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] INT2 V3 [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] FC fade...


[INTRO]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]Bsus2[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]Bsus2[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]

[VERSE 1]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
When you feel all alone[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And the world has turned its back on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Give me a moment please  to tame your wild wild heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Bsus[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I know you feel like the walls are closing in on you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
It's hard to find relief and people can be so cold[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]                    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
When darkness is upon your door and you feel like you can't take anymore[/tab]


[CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
   Lift you up and fly away  with you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
   If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
   You're not alone[/tab]


[INTERLUDE 1]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]


[VERSE 2]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
When you feel all alone[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And a loyal friend is hard to find[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
You're caught in a one way street[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]Asus2[/ch]
With the monsters in your head[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
When hopes and dreams are far    away    and[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
You feel like you can't face the day[/tab]


[CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
   Lift you up and fly away  with you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
   If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
   You're not alone[/tab]


[BRIDGE]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]AM7[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#m[/ch]
   'Cause there has always been heartache and pain[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
   And when it's over you'll breathe    again[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   You'll breathe again[/tab]


[INTERLUDE 2]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]


[VERSE 3] (first part of verse 1)
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
When you feel all alone[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And the world has turned its back on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Give me a moment please  to tame your wild wild heart[/tab]


[CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
   Lift you up and fly away  with you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
   If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
   You're not alone[/tab]


[CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   Let me be the one you call[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   If you jump I'll break your fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
   Lift you up and fly away  with you into the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   I can mend a broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
   If you need to crash then crash and burn[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
   You're not alone[/tab]


[FINAL CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   Let me be the one you call (ooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   If you jump I'll break your fall (you're not alone)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
   Lift you up and fly away  with you into the night (no, no, you're not alone)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
   If you need to fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
   I can mend a broken heart (you're not alone)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
   If you need to crash then crash and burn (if you need to crash and burn)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
   You're not alone (you're not alone)[/tab]

Choruses until fade...
